title: Mutator result (one child program)
description: What a Mutator returns after proposing a SEARCH/REPLACE diff to a parent program and cascade-evaluating the child. Minimal by design: the orchestrator COMPUTES the archive axes (complexity = log param count; diversity = avg edit-distance to a reference sample) from the child's sandbox — the Mutator does not.

parent_id.description: The parent program's id; null for a GEN-0 baseline seed.

approach_summary.description: One line: what the diff changed.

sandbox_path.description: <sandbox_root>/lae/programs/<child_id>/ (holds the child's editable-file copies + logs + artifacts).

status.description: evaluated = passed the smoke gate and got a full run; smoke_dropped = filtered by the cascade; crash = run failed.
